stemHtml: A Pilot is preparing for take-off and spots ice on the wings' surface. What should he/she do ?

options.a: Turn on the anti-ice system to melt the ice on the wings.
options.b: If ice covers less than 25% of the wings' surface, it is safe to take-off.
options.c: Its unsafe to take-off, due to the possible damage on the engines blades intake.
options.d: If run-up is completed, it is safe to take-off.
